label: Sprint 30 — 10-NDA triage

events.text: I've dropped the latest NDAs in the matter folder from prospective counterparties this week. Give me a per-NDA read on each — GREEN / YELLOW / RED — with the top issues for each, so I can decide which ones legal needs to touch and which can go straight to sign.
A few more came in — same triage, please.
Draft a counterparty email to Cypress's legal team walking through our top-3 issues on their NDA — keep it tight and professional, ready for the relationship lead to send.

playbook.rationale: Filename noun matches NDA task noun.

skill.rationale: nda-review slug names the task at its actual level.

delegate.rationale: Turn 1 names a quantity of independent items (6+4=10 NDAs). Independent reads — explicit positive case for delegate.

redline.rationale: No redline asked. Turn 3 is an email draft, not a redline.

notes: Sprint 30 Test 2 verbatim. Persona is Helena Marwick, GC. Wave 1 (6 NDAs) in matter folder at session open; wave 2 (4 NDAs) dropped between Turn 1 and Turn 2. This is the highest-discrimination scenario in Sprint 32 — all three affordances (playbook, skill, delegate) target it.
